security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://workers.dev https://*.workers.dev; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://mineskin.eu https://*.googleusercontent.com https://cdn.discordapp.com https://media.discordapp.net; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; media-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
